mapper.sql: id, AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(email), 'tb_mbm_user') email, username, active_yn, AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(phone_number), 'tb_mbm_user') phoneNumber, age_group, age_group_val, birth_day, birth_year, kakao_user_id, join_date, disable_resn, pi_agree_yn, pi_agree_dttm, pol_agree_yn, pol_agree_dttm, sms_agree_yn, sms_agree_dttm, email_agree_yn, email_agree_dttm, member_stat, create_date, create_id, modified_date, modified_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mbm_user ( email, username, active_yn, phone_number, age_group, age_group_val, birth_day, birth_year, kakao_user_id, join_date, disable_resn, pi_agree_yn, pi_agree_dttm, pol_agree_yn, pol_agree_dttm, sms_agree_yn, sms_agree_dttm, email_agree_yn, email_agree_dttm, member_stat, create_date, create_id, modified_date, modified_id ) VALUES ( TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{email},'tb_mbm_user')), #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{phoneNumber},'tb_mbm_user')), #{ageGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ageGroupVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthDay, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthYear, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{kakaoUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{joinDate}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), #{disableResn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piAgreeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{piAgreeDttm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{polAgreeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{polAgreeDttm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smsAgreeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{smsAgreeDttm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{emailAgreeYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{emailAgreeDttm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{memberStat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{modifiedId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_mbm_user SET username = #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
birth_day = #{birthDay, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
birth_year = #{birthYear, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
age_group = #{ageGroup, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
age_group_val = #{ageGroupVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
active_yn = #{activeYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone_number = TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{phoneNumber},'tb_mbm_user')),
email =TO_BASE64(AES_ENCRYPT(#{email},'tb_mbm_user')),
kakao_user_id = #{kakaoUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
WHERE id = #{id}
